role_summary: the finance manager is responsible for managing the organization’s financial planning,  accounting operations, reporting, and compliance to support business objectives.
responsibilities: • oversee day -to-day finance and accounting operations   • prepare budgets, forecasts, and variance analysis   • ensure accurate monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports   • manage s tatutory compliance (gst, income tax, tds, roc)   • coordinate with auditors, bankers, and consultants   • support management with financial analysis and decision support
qualifications: • qualified chartered accountant   • strong knowledge of accounting, taxat ion, and reporting   • experience with erp systems and mis reporting   • analytical and communication skills
